_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Participate in Risk Governance process to provide security risks, mitigations, and input on other technical risk.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.668), RM-T-007 (RM, cosine: 0.618).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.547). Shared vocabulary: [governance, risk]. DCWF-only terms [input, mitigations, participate, process, provide, risks] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.874, R=0.869). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Participate in Risk Governance process to provide security risks, mitigations, a" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.735 > STS 0.547 (gap +0.188). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [governance, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [governance, risk]. DCWF-only: [input, mitigations, participate, process, provide, risks]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].

signals.detail: STS 0.547 barely clears classification threshold for Equal. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.188 with low STS 0.547. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
